title: Moola Market - REKT
relevance_summary: Price manipulation followed by borrowing large amounts of assets on a lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that shows signs of price manipulation followed by large-scale borrowing

red_flags: Large-scale borrowing shortly after price manipulation
summary: The attacker manipulated the price of MOO collateral on Moola Market, allowing them to borrow large amounts of assets, resulting in a loss of $8.4M. A guard could have detected this by blocking transactions showing signs of price manipulation followed by large-scale borrowing.
